title: ETE Task
description: Schema for task records stored as {task_id}.json in the tasks/ directory of an ETE bundle. Represents a single unit of work within a project.

project_id.description: Identifier of the project this task belongs to.

assignee.description: Person or agent assigned to this task.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the task was created.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the task was completed. Null if not yet completed.

depends_on.description: List of task_id values that this task depends on.

extra.description: System-specific metadata preserved but not interpreted by ETE.
